programme.title: Martial Law II: Undercover
programme.desc: Two undercover cops investigating a murder uncover a deadly ring of corruption at a nightclub where the rich are entertained by seductive women and protected by martial arts experts.

programme.title: Crazy Samurai: 400 vs 1
programme.desc: When a samurai arrives to duel the disgraced Yoshioka, he walks into an ambush. In the world’s first 77-minute, one-take samurai action film, he fights for his life against 400 warriors, earning a place in history as CRAZY SAMURAI MUSASHI.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: Best of the Best
programme.desc: Eric Roberts, Philip Rhee, Christopher Penn, John Dye and David Agresta play five men who are selected as members of the U.S. National Karate Team. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Hong Kong, an American woman is beaten up and mugged by thugs. She's taken in by a martial arts master who trains her for a formidable fight competition known as the Kumite.

programme.title: Ultimate Fight
programme.desc: A martial arts champion saves the life of a street fighter and must fight for him in the ultimate fight to the death.

programme.title: The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable hero, Leroy, who aspires to become a kung fu master. Though black and living in Harlem with his family, Leroy lives like a Chinese. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Lela's es un restaurante exclusivo que desesperadamente necesita más clientela.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Damon competes against an unscrupulous rival for the position of head mechanic on Terra Venture.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: The Terra Venture discovers the fabled Lost Galaxy.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: The Rangers are welcomed to the Lost Galaxy by a scheming space pirate named Captain Mutiny.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: The Rangers battle the enormous Grunchor monster that has burrowed inside Terra Venture.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Captured by Deviot, Leo and Damon reminisce over their adventures up until now.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Captain Mutiny's sorceress Hexuba uses her magic to cause the Power Rangers to fall into a deep restless sleep.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Hexuba uses her magic to resurrect defeated monsters to battle the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Captain Mutiny unleashes the gargantuan Titanisaur on Terra Venture, the greatest threat the Rangers have faced yet.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Mike sacrifices to help Terra Venture escape the Lost Galaxy.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Terra Venture discovers a lush green planet to colonize as Trakeena merges with Deviot to become stronger than ever.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: The Rangers work to evacuate the crew of Terra Venture as Trakeena launches her final assault.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: Trapped on a desolate Moon in the ruins of Terra Venture, Leo faces Trakeena all alone.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lightspeed Rescue
programme.desc: Five brave young men and women are recruited by the secret agency Lightspeed Rescue to stop a band of demons from destroying Mariner Bay.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lightspeed Rescue
programme.desc: The Rangers deploy the Rescue Bird to evacuate people from a burning building while fighting the lava monster Magmavore.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lightspeed Rescue
programme.desc: Carter struggles with leading the Rangers in battle as he recalls a traumatic event from his childhood.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lightspeed Rescue
programme.desc: The team rushes to help Kelsey's friend Nancy to land a space shuttle under attack by Diabolico.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lightspeed Rescue
programme.desc: Dana is trusted with a special assignment by her father.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lightspeed Rescue
programme.desc: The Rangers and Vypra battle it out in new advanced vehicles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.desc: A luxury sports box, intense jealousy, and allegedly improper behavior with a family member come into play when ex-lovers call it quits.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: An elderly rebel with a cause stops the construction of a 'monstrosity' next to his home; he claims illegal attempts were made to silence him.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A man suffering from diabetes is sued by his mother for living expenses after her younger, sicker son's dietary needs are compromised.; A woman accuses her ex-lover of making a run for it with her share of their security deposit.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A woman offers up an outrageous claim that her cousin caused her to lose her job after she failed to find her own ride to work.; The Judges uncover a trail of deceit when a woman claims her mechanic damaged her car and then held it hostage.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Tenants are accused of misconstruing a text sent by their landlord regarding ghastly living conditions.; A handyman must defend his workmanship when a flat screen TV crashes to a client's floor six months after installation.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A childcare provider claims she was forced to shut her daycare doors after an ex-client allegedly bad-mouthed her to other parents.; A tattoo artist accuses a client's husband of making vulgar comments while she was trying to work on his wife.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: Bones

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate a set of uniquely disfigured remains allegorizing biblical text; a Jeffersonian intern reveals a secret about his past.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Dr. Sweets deals with post traumatic stress after his subway train is derailed by flood water; a partially skeletonized body is discovered.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers a secret dogfighting ring, which leads to an unexpected move by one of the team members.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Fornell's crusade to find the head of the drug ring responsible for Fornell's daughter Emily's overdose comes to a climax; Gibbs and Vance finally let the team in on a case that has dangerous implications.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Vance assigns McGee, Torres and Bishop to COVID compliance duty at a foreign affairs summit, where they discover a link to another NCIS team's murder case.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Evidence from the stabbing of a Marine sergeant leads Torres to meet his father, who left when Torres was a child.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates a biker killed in a hit-and-run; Gibbs prepares to testify against a financial adviser who stole millions from his Navy clients.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: NCIS tracks a stolen laptop to the uncle of a young boy, Phineas, Gibbs' former neighbor.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When members of an NCIS Regional Enforcement Action Capabilities Training Team are killed during an explosion, NCIS Special Agent Jessica Knight, the lone surviving member, helps crack the case using high-tech body armor.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While pursuing a dangerous arms dealer, the team is shocked when Bishop is implicated in an old NSA leak; Gibbs and Marcie realize the killer they've been tracking may be onto them.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As the NCIS team searches for Gibbs after wreckage from his boat is discovered; they find out he was tracking a serial killer with journalist Marcie Warren, who wrote an exposé on him.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While trying to find the serial killer Gibbs was after, the NCIS team discovers another person has been tracking the case as well.

programme.desc: The artists burn designs into a cowgirl's chaps during the Flash Challenge, and legendary artist Mike Rubendall assesses Japanese-style tattoos during the elimination round.

programme.desc: The artists are tasked with customizing guitars for Dave, a canvas gets sick during the Elimination Tattoo, and artist Forrest Cavacco joins the panel as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists team up to create customized grills for lowrider cars, canvases sit for gory tattoos, and NFL star Chris Johnson joins the panel as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists tackle tattooing over scarred skin in the Flash Challenge, a canvas asks for a Day of the Dead portrait of Tatu Baby, and artist Chuey Quintanar is a guest judge.

programme.desc: The artists transform models into animals in the Flash Challenge, and veteran tattoo artist Troy Denning judges the artists' Asian-style tattoos in the elimination challenge.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Filadelfia, una lucha despiadada para hacerse con el poder condujo a una guerra de la mafia a gran escala. La familia del crimen de la mafia local se dividió en dos mientras los jóvenes y los mayores se enfrentaban a muerte.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los años ochenta, el FBI tuvo una batalla de inteligencia con un astuto ladrón de bancos. Él hacía una planificación meticulosa y ejecutaba sus crímenes con precisión militar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Puerto Rico, combatientes violentos intentaron convertir el estado autónomo de Estados Unidos en una dictadura comunista.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En los años ochenta, el comercio de drogas hizo estragos en los vecindarios dentro de la ciudad de Chicago, y los crímenes violentos amenazaban con destruir comunidades enteras.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando un auto bomba estalla en Washington D. C. y se cobra las vidas de un exembajador y su secretaria, el FBI entra en el caso y comienza a investigar varios hechos que constituían una red de conspiración a gran escala.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, unos extorsionistas colocaron una bomba de casi media tonelada en un casino de Nevada y exigieron un pago de millones de dólares, bajo la amenaza de detonar el dispositivo en caso de no recibir el dinero.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Nueva York, el FBI y la policía local unieron fuerzas para combatir el ingreso constante de cocaína de Colombia por los puertos de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la década de los ochenta, el Departamento de Policía de la Ciudad de Nueva York estaba perdiendo la batalla contra las drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Puerto Rico, la muerte de un testigo del gobierno y las circunstancias sospechosas que lo rodeaban guiaron al FBI y las autoridades locales a sospechar de corrupción en los altos cargos de las fuerzas policiales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1999, la policía investigó dos asesinatos crueles en dos pequeñas ciudades a cientos de kilómetros de distancia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el suroeste, un ladrón en serie de bancos afirmaba que su botín era para los pobres, pero este ladrón no era ningún héroe popular, pues tenía un arma y estaba dispuesto a disparar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1987, siete reos escaparon de una prisión de máxima seguridad en Nuevo México. Los fugados, todos criminales violentos, eran una amenaza para cualquiera que se cruzara en su camino.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Boston, agentes del FBI y la policía local rastrearon a una banda de ladrones que se especializaban en el desmantelamiento de vehículos blindados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Using Zartan's synthoid technology, Cobra commander replaces key politicians and military leaders in an effort to cut off the Joes' funding.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Cobra's s plot proves to be working… until Destro discovers a duplicate of himself constructed by Cobra commander. The angered Destro takes information on the synthoids to the only people on Earth who can stop Cobra: G.I. Joe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander hires a gypsy to summon the spirits of three great warriors from the past. Once in control of the ghosts, he commands them to destroy G.I. Joe. But the Baroness, now relieved of her duties, tells the Joes how to eliminate the threat.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joes go Hollywood as technical advisers on a movie about their special-missions unit. But when the filmmakers attempt to use a captured Cobra stinger, Cobra Commander has another idea for the movie's ending.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Led by the Drednoks, gangs run wild in the streets to prevent the election of a candidate who wants to clean up the city. The gangs don't know that Cobra is funding his opponent, and the gang outbursts are calculated to ensure a landslide victory.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plans to throw the country into economic chaos! With a molecular regenerator at his fingertips, Cobra commander plans to disintegrate U.S. currency and replace it with Cobra coin. Flint, Ripcord, and Ace jump into action to help cancel these checks.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra kidnaps people with paranormal powers for a battalion of "Special Recruits," hoping to use their incredible gifts against the Joes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra attacks the U.S. treasury's printing plant, but its not money they're after. Cobra commander wants fort Knox's top-secret blueprints in order to stage the most incredible robbery of all time! That is, unless the Joes can stop this gold rush.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra mounts an attack on the oil fields of a Middle Eastern kingdom. When the Joe team responds, their skystrikers are torn apart in midair by Cobra's sonic scrambler, a soundwave device powerful enough to shatter weapons and vehicles into pieces.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses a dude ranch as a base of operations to seize a government solar energy project. Once they have it under their control, Cobra commander plans to harness the power of the sun itself to wreak destruction on the western United States!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Flint, Lady Jaye, Cobra commander and the Baroness are kidnapped by a demented and powerful genius. On his private island, they battle deadly life-sized toys in a game with only one possible winner...until they do the unthinkable: team up!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Quick kick gives a martial arts demonstration on a college campus, Amber, a student, wants to join the Joe team. When she tries to prove her worth by taking on Cobra by herself, the Joes have to teach her - and Cobra - what teamwork is all about.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals a dangerous bacterium that proves resistant to antibiotics. But when it's accidentally exposed to air and grows to monstrous proportions, Airtight and the rest of the Joes must battle this giant germ before it causes massive destruction.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A mysterious series of telephone tips about “The Viper” sends the Joes across the globe, raiding one Cobra operation after another to prevent attack. But when they learn Cobra is not responsible for the messages, they have to find out exactly who is.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When the Baroness acquires a legendary conch and uses its mind-controlling siren song on all the males among Joe and Cobra's ranks, it's up to Scarlett, Lady Jaye and Cover Girl to end her reign of terror.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra mounts an attack on the oil fields of a Middle Eastern kingdom. When the Joe team responds, their skystrikers are torn apart in midair by Cobra's sonic scrambler, a soundwave device powerful enough to shatter weapons and vehicles into pieces.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses a dude ranch as a base of operations to seize a government solar energy project. Once they have it under their control, Cobra commander plans to harness the power of the sun itself to wreak destruction on the western United States!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Flint, Lady Jaye, Cobra commander and the Baroness are kidnapped by a demented and powerful genius. On his private island, they battle deadly life-sized toys in a game with only one possible winner...until they do the unthinkable: team up!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Quick kick gives a martial arts demonstration on a college campus, Amber, a student, wants to join the Joe team. When she tries to prove her worth by taking on Cobra by herself, the Joes have to teach her - and Cobra - what teamwork is all about.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals a dangerous bacterium that proves resistant to antibiotics. But when it's accidentally exposed to air and grows to monstrous proportions, Airtight and the rest of the Joes must battle this giant germ before it causes massive destruction.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A mysterious series of telephone tips about “The Viper” sends the Joes across the globe, raiding one Cobra operation after another to prevent attack. But when they learn Cobra is not responsible for the messages, they have to find out exactly who is.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When the Baroness acquires a legendary conch and uses its mind-controlling siren song on all the males among Joe and Cobra's ranks, it's up to Scarlett, Lady Jaye and Cover Girl to end her reign of terror.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra has developed the ultimate weapon… the M.A.S.S. Device, capable of beaming and transporting troops, weapon and resources anywhere in the world. When Cobra uses the device to steal a military satellite, G.I. Joe is called into action.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. As Duke recovers from his injuries, Snake Eyes wanders the arctic, poisoned by the radioactive crystal elements he recovered from a Cobra trap. But can Snake Eyes survive the radiation arctic conditions and dangers that await him?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. After Cobra Commander squanders his resources, both Cobra and G.I. Joe are desperate to get their hands on the final element needed to fuel the M.A.S.S. Device. It's Joe versus Cobra at themouth of an active volcano, winner take all!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja celebrate their escape from the Vermillion Army and their retrieval of the Emerald Time Blade, but with Acronix and Krux determined to get their Blade back, the Airjitzu Temple becomes a battleground.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Nya confronts the Samurai X imposter, Kai pursues the truth about his parents and the other Ninja desperately seek to locate and rescue Master Wu. But as usual, some answers only lead to more questions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai confronts his dad for aiding the Hands of Time, only to discover that his parents are actually Acronix and Krux's captives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Hands of Time blackmail Kai and Nya into using their combined Elemental powers to retrieve the fourth and final Time Blade from the Boiling Sea with the promise that the siblings can use its reversal power to save the quickly-fading Master Wu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai and Nya stow away aboard Krux and Acronix’s time-traveling snake mech in a desperate attempt to save Master Wu. But when they arrive in the past, they must help the Elemental Masters prevent the Hands of Time from re-writing Ninjago history.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of a vicious attack upon the palace, the Sons of Garmadon steal the second Oni Mask, and the ninja invite the royal princess, Harumi, into their makeshift family.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi adjusts to life with the ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order to join the Sons of Garmadon, Zane (aka Snake Jaguar) participates in a deadly motorcycle initiation race.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Zane’s near demise at the hands of Mr. E forces the ninja to flee aboard the Bounty, where they discover that a transmission Zane intercepted may reveal the hidden location of the Quiet One.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi search the Oni Temple for the last mask, the ninja are taken hostage and discover Princess Harumi’s true intentions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja appeal to the police commissioner of Ninjago in an effort to help save Lloyd and thwart Harumi’s efforts to resurrect the evil Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just when the Ninja think they have saved the day, Lord Garmadon returns to NINJAGO, and frees Harumi, who encourages him to “achieve his true potential” by conquering the one thing that has always stood in his way… his son, Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja race to save Lloyd, as a more powerful-than-ever Lord Garmadon creates an enormous Colossi to help him rule NINJAGO and defeat the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Blood Moon
programme.desc: While protecting Ninjago City from daily threats, the Ninja encounters a new elemental master in league with an old enemy.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.desc: Fenway Park first opened on April 20, 1912 and since then has been known for its unique features and historic moments. Current and former Red Sox players share their experiences playing in one of baseball's greatest ballparks.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game
programme.desc: Take an exclusive tour of Comerica Park in Detroit, Michigan. The Tigers' home since 2000 is known for its large dimensions and scoreboard.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game
programme.desc: Take an exclusive tour of Safeco Field in Seattle, Washington. Now under the new name, T-Mobile Park, the stadium has been the Mariners' home since July of 1999.

programme.title: Baseball Seasons
programme.desc: In 2004, we get the biggest comeback in postseason history and an 86-year-old "curse" is broken. Ichiro Suzuki attempts to break the single-season hit record and Carlos Beltran goes on a power surge during the playoffs.

programme.title: Wrigley Field 100 Years
programme.desc: Celebrate a century of the greatest moments and best personalities from the Cubs' historic ballpark. The ivy wall and renditions of "Take Me Out to the Ballgame" are just a couple of features that make Wrigley Field one of the game's best stadiums.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Throughout his career, throwing a no-hitter was one accolade that had eluded Hall of Famer Tom Seaver. There were many close calls and one-hitters, but finally on June 16, 1978, Tom Terrific made history with the Reds and kept the Cardinals hitless.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Samson vs. The Vampire Women

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Just Shoot Me

programme.title: Just Shoot Me

programme.title: I Survived . . .

programme.desc: Two friends become murder suspects in Louisiana.

programme.desc: A Virginia couple's blissful retirement ends with a horrifying twist.

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers – security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor llega con un biciclo antiguo que pone a Rick a rodar: ¿decidirá que este trato vale la pena o le dará la vuelta? A Chum le toca el lado filoso del trato en el momento en que le vende una katana japonesa a Dana White, el presidente de la UFC.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick visita una galería de arte en el Hotel Venetian para ver las ilustraciones carísimas del clásico libro para niños "Donde viven los monstruos". Mientras tanto, en Gold & Silver, aparece una colección extraordinaria de discos de vinilo de los Beatles.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick cree que vale la pena comprar la primera moneda estadounidense, pero le va a costar una gran cantidad de dinero. Corey y Chum le ven futuro a una lonchera antigua de la serie animada "Los supersónicos" que llega deslizándose por el mostrador.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick y Corey están inspirados con un discurso firmado por Martin Luther King. ¿Se unirán a la causa adquiriéndolo o se quedarán sin participar? Rick y Chum quieren un barco a control remoto, la versión miniatura del Crucero de la Selva de Disney.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick intenta conseguir una tarjeta autografiada del presidente Abraham Lincoln que no imagina no tener. Corey y Chum piensan en ofrecer mucho dinero por el mango de un driver de golf diseñado para el presidente Bill Clinton.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Los expertos del empeño empiezan el episodio explosivamente cuando dos pistolas de retrocarga del siglo XVIII llegan a la tienda.

programme.title: Momentos históricos 1: 1886 - 1930
programme.desc: El triunfo del automóvil comenzó hace más de 100 años. Los inventores construyen vehículos cada vez más sofisticados y se convierten en jefes comerciales. Se conducen carreras, se rompen los primeros récords.

programme.title: Momentos históricos
programme.desc: Los años treinta dan testimonio de nuevas dimensiones del desarrollo. Si los automóviles civiles adquieren formas más atrevidas, los autos de carreras se vuelven cada vez más rápidos.

programme.title: Momentos históricos 3: 1947 - 1960
programme.desc: A finales de los años 40 y 50, las señales apuntan a un nuevo comienzo. La producción de coches pequeños y las carreras mueven a las masas. Por primera vez, un fabricante italiano de automóviles de carreras está dejando una huella.

programme.title: Momentos históricos 4: 1960 - 1970
programme.desc: La década de 1960 es colorida. Los coches pequeños siguen siendo muy populares, pero la clase media exige más. Quienes puedan permitírselo cumplirán su sueño del primer automóvil hecho a medida de carretera con motor de auto de carreras.

programme.title: Momentos históricos
programme.desc: En los años 70, la crisis del petróleo desencadenó un terremoto industrial. La economía y la seguridad están en primer plano. Un año después del aterrizaje en la luna, las posibilidades de la tecnología informática se utilizan para construir automóviles.

programme.title: Momentos históricos
programme.desc: La década de 1980 se caracterizó por enormes coches de rally y la primera era turbo de la Fórmula 1 con hasta 1.200 CV. El Porsche 959 es el más rápido en la carretera, mientras que Ferrari lo sigue con el F40.

programme.title: Momentos históricos 7: 1990 - 2007
programme.desc: Toyota se convierte en fabricante de automóviles número uno del mundo y trae la serie híbrida. Alemania está experimentando el cambio y consigue su primer campeón mundial de Fórmula 1. El nuevo milenio presenta muchas innovaciones y expansiones.

programme.title: Momentos históricos 1: 1886 - 1930
programme.desc: El triunfo del automóvil comenzó hace más de 100 años. Los inventores construyen vehículos cada vez más sofisticados y se convierten en jefes comerciales. Se conducen carreras, se rompen los primeros récords.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: El futuro pinta bien para Gold & Silver con una pintura de Marc Chagall que le llama la atención a Rick. ¿Obtendrá esta obra maestra o acabará con un trato descolorido? Más tarde, Rick intenta comprar un anillo de la Serie Mundial de los Boston Red Sox.

programme.desc: Dos de los carnívoros más poderosos de África impactan uno con otro en la sabana. Leones y hienas deben matar casi todos los días para mantener a grandes familias.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Africa's Big Cats es una mirada cercana a la vida de tres familias de los depredadores felinos más efectivos e icónicos de África que viven en el famoso Parque Kruger: una leona, un leopardo y dos guepardos.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: La lujosa aventura a penas está tomando rumbo, y es ahora San Miguel de Allende, Guanajuato, la sede de este viajero.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Como a Charlie le ha gustado bastante adentrarse en la gastronomía, decide visitar a tres reconocidos chefs, quienes compartirán varios secretos y exclusivas recetas con él.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Charlie está dispuesto a vivir uno de los destinos más paradisíacos y lujosos de México de la manera más exclusiva: conociendo los hoteles más cotizados del sitio.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Si de lujos se trata, Charlie sabe que la Ciudad de México tiene mucho qué ofrecer, por lo que está dispuesto a pasar un fin de semana inolvidable en el hotel St. Regis.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Charlie se da tiempo para conocer un lado imperdible de Barcelona: su cultura, recorriendo el Barrio Gótico y, por supuesto, degustando su gastronomía.

programme.title: Agenda Privada

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Colombia es un país fascinante, rico en belleza natural y cultura, incluida la selva amazónica. Viaja por carretera en Bogotá y obtén una mirada íntima a la vida cotidiana de los colombianos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Hong Kong es una ciudad de ambición. Los rayos láser se disparan hacia el cielo, acentuando los ángulos de los rascacielos. Sobre la bahía, los botes chatarreros reflejan destellos de color, mientras que la luz brilla.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony atrapa un caimán Bayou, se refresca con helado mundialmente famoso, tiene problemas con la ley, come jambalaya con un chef bailarín y se relaja con un poco de jazz local.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.desc: While researching his family tree, SpongeBob discovers that one of his ancestors was a famous chili-slinger named SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick engage in an epic battle over cleanliness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's friends must search for him when he develops amnesia and goes missing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is rushed to the hospital when SpongeBob accidentally slams the door on his face; the music that comes from the wind blowing through SpongeBob's holes attracts jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has krabby patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's clumsy cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is outraged when he sees Squilliam on a TV show about fancy homes; Plankton forms a rock band with SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward.

programme.title: Sponge Bob
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed when he thinks that SpongeBob has found a penny; SpongeBob tries to memorize the history of boating in one night.

programme.title: Sponge Bob
programme.desc: Plankton builds a coliseum and holds a gladiator show; SpongeBob and Patrick keep Squidward from concentrating on his music.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become normal; SpongeBob wakes to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to remove a splinter before Mr. Krabs learns about it and sends him home early; SpongeBob and Patrick get new slide whistles and keep playing them, much to the annoyance of Squidward.

programme.title: Sponge Bob
programme.desc: Patrick wants to become more of a daredevil like Larry the Lobster; SpongeBob and Patrick decide to get tan so that they can attend a big party.

programme.title: Sponge Bob
programme.desc: Squidward turns into a giant after he is sprayed with plant growth spray; Patrick decides that he wants a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in charge of delivering the secret krabby patty ingredient safely to the Krusty Krab; Plankton has a customer who eats at the Chum Bucket every day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets caught speeding and is sent to boating school; Mr. Krabs launches a tabloid newspaper.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln va a su primer concierto de rock junto a Luna, quien está decidida a hacerle pasar un momento inolvidable; cuando Lincoln encuentrra un sobre en el ático cree que se trata de un fajo de billetes oculto por alguien de la casa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln entrena a Lana para que sustituya a Lola en un concurso, ya que Lola está enferma; Lincoln y Clyde creen que será sencillo hacer de niñeros de Lilly, pero no lo es.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene las manos ocupadas cuando sus diez hermanas le piden cubrirlas en el mismo día; Bobby y Lori van en una cita doble con Lincoln y la pequeña hermana de Bobby, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln comienza a pasar mucho tiempo en casa de Clyde, porque el padre de éste le presta más atención que su propio padre; Lincoln se monta en una limosina, y después de haber probado el sabor de la buena vida, su actitud cambia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia de Lincoln forma una banda cuando él se inscribe para un concurso de talentos; la madre de Lincoln le ofrece llevarlo a la oficina dental en la que ella trabaja, mientras que sus hermanas van a trabajar con su padre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: El Día de los Inocentes, Luan gasta bromas a toda la casa, pero Lincoln este año tiene un plan para evitar caer en ellas; los hermanos Loud van juntos al supermercado a hacer la compra para su mamá, pero Lincoln tiene un plan alternativo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde tienen que empezar un negocio, como parte de una tarea escolar, así que comienzan a ganar dinero con la experiencia de Lincoln tratando con chicas; los miembros de la familia Loud se venden los unos a los otros en una subasta.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde van de acampada para recuperar su hombría perdida; Lincoln consigue a Lori un empleo en una sala de videojuegos que además es pizzería, pero Lori se mete en problemas cuando Lincoln comienza a pedirle favores.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Aunque su madre le obliga, Lincoln no quiere jugar al fútbol americano, pero él tiene un plan para que Lynn lo sustituya; Licoln se vuelve un hipocondríaco después de que Lucy le augure que su día terminará en un desastre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln accidentalmente le arreglan cuatro citas para el baile Sadie Hawkins en la escuela; cuando Lincoln y Bobby se hacen amigos, Lori se dispone a poner a Bobby celoso pasando el tiempo con Clyde.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln desearía tener diez hermanos en lugar de diez hermanas, pero Lisa le abre los ojos y le enseña cuál es la realidad; Lola quiere formar parte de un club secreto de hermanos, pero sus hermanos no son tan partidarios.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln empieza a acaparar la atención cuando se convierte en asistente de Luan; los ruidosos niños se divierten en un día nevado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln se enamoran de su nuevo profesor particular, por lo que él no puede estudiar; los niños se quejan de su casa, pero cuando un tornado la destruye, cambian de manera de pensar.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde hacen una pasantia donde Flip, obteniendo el título de gerentes; Lincoln, preocupado por lo aburrida que se ha vuelto la vida diaria del abuelo, lo lleva afuera para pasar juntos una jornada memorable.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde le pide consejo a Lincoln sobre cómo ser un buen hermano mayor porque se ha enterado de que sus padres van a tener otro hijo; Lori y Leni han comprado dos vestidos idénticos, lo que origina una discusión tremenda en casa de los Loud.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando los Laud ganan un viaje a un complejo, deciden llevar a sus hijos con ellos porque estos prometieron comportarse; cuando Lucy se enamora de un chico normal y corriente, su hermana decide cambiarle el look.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La posición social de Lincoln está en juego cuando su hermana de 4 años de edad entra en su clase de quinto grado; los niños se cansan de que la camioneta familiar se malogre, por lo que deciden tratar de engañar a papá para que compre una nueva.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lola y Lana quieren ser scouts, pero se dan cuenta de que una está más capacitada que la otra para lograrlo; Lincoln y Clyde creen que Bobby está engañando a Lori, por lo que lo siguen a todos lados para recabar pruebas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Papá se enfada con los niños porque nunca cierran la puerta principal de la vivienda, por lo que decide tomar medidas para asegurar que la vivienda esté protegida; Lincoln borra sin querer sus fotos de infancia y Clyde y él intentan recrearlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas creen que Lincoln da mala suerte y le prohíben asistir a sus actividades o colaborar en ellas; cuando Lincoln descubre que en su clase se va a diseccionar ranas, Lana y él emprenden una misión para rescatarlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los planes de descanso de primavera de Lincoln y Clyde se ponen en peligro cuando sólo tienen un día para completar su lista; Lori lanza una fiesta sofisticada, pero resulta contraproducente cuando a sus invitados no les gusta lo que había planeado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cansados de comer siempre lo mismo, los niños preparan un sabotaje para poder cenar pizza; Lincoln y Ronnie Anne tienen que cuidar un huevo, pero Lincoln no confía en ella.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde participan en un concurso de cómics para conocer a uno de sus ídolos, pero se llevan una sorpresa poco agradable. Lana trae una nueva mascota a casa y todos la adoran, pero las cuatro mascotas de los Loud confabulan en su contra.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los niños oyen a Lily decir groserías y les preocupa estar siendo una mala influencia para ella; llega una carta de amor dirigida a "L", y la familia está intrigada por saber para quién va exactamente.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Bobby van a la ciudad para visitar a su numerosa familia que es alocada y caótica. Después de ver lo bien que los niños están ahí, la mamá de Ronnie Anne admite que quiere mudarse con su familia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde quieren ser recordados por siempre en la escuela, por ello se proponen colarse en las fotografías de todos los grupos; Lincoln sugiere a sus hermanas que se sometan a un test de compatibilidad porque están siempre discutiendo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde está preocupado porque Lincoln está triste y trata de animarlo; Lucy utiliza un libro de hechizos para darles a sus hermanos una lección.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia Loud cree que está a salvo de las bromas del Día de los Inocentes porque el bromista Luan se encuentra de campamento; cuando los niños descubren que su padre ya no está en el trabajo antiguo, creen que puede ser su culpa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde descubren que "ARGGH" viene a la ciudad y deciden ir a la grabación. Cansada de sus hermanos, Lori se muda al garaje, pero rápidamente descubre que es más de lo que esperaba.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Para desviar la atención de sus padres sobreprotectores, Clyde arregla todo para que un estudiante de intercambio se quede con ellos. Lola toma a una nueva compañera de clases tímida bajo su protección y la transforma en una mariposa social.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Después de conocer a una familia admirable, los padres Loud temen que sus hijos no estén haciendo lo suficiente como para asegurarse un futuro exitoso; los hermanos deciden asociarse para eliminar a Lynn.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln enseña a sus hermanas cómo pedir dinero a sus padres; Lisa tiene problemas para relacionarse socialmente y esto repercute en sus notas académicas, así que si quiere mejorar en la escuela necesita demostrar a sus maestros que tiene amigos.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando Luan escucha por casualidad a sus hermanos quejándose de su comedia, ella decide abandonarla; los niños deciden no contarle a Leni sobre la próxima fiesta de su madre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y su papá van a "Leyendas del Templo Oculto" y no pueden esperar ni un minuto para pasar un día juntos entre padre e hijo; Lincoln quiere ir al centro comercial, pero tiene que cuidar a sus hermanas menores, por lo que decide llevarlas.

programme.desc: Tony is geared up for a steamier round two of food porn.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores Hurricane Katrina's true impact on New Orleans.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels to the heart and soul of America's rust belt.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily - a country of beauty, history and passion.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony's travels finally bring him to Rome.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain begins his Miami exploration in vibrant Little Haiti.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony celebrates Zamir's 50th birthday with a trip to Romania.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores quirky, dark, classic Southwestern region of America.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
